title: Market Research Analyst

rationales.taskAutomation: Survey fielding, cross-tabulation, competitive monitoring, and standard market-sizing are digital-data tasks that AI tools now handle at professional quality most of the time.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI-native survey and analytics platforms are credible, fast-improving role-specific products, though not yet as universally embedded as coding or transcription tools.
rationales.adoption: Large firms and tech-forward research shops have made AI-assisted analytics standard, with mid-market adoption still catching up.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can run the pull-tabulate-monitor loop for competitive and quantitative tracking, but framing a novel research question and reading qualitative nuance stay human.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-1161 Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists, p25-p75 rounded
insight: Tabulating data and tracking competitors is now agent work. Analysts who ask the sharper research question and translate findings into a strategic story for leadership are the ones that stay in the room.
